/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 74: Assume statements are allowed only in component types: AGREE annex is attached to implementation Q.Impl, but assume statements must be in component type Q -> move the entire annex block from Q.Impl to Q
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 74: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Sink'.: Data_Sink is a port of component Q, not visible in Q.Impl context for contracts -> keep Data_Sink as-is since it is a feature of Q and will be visible in Q's annex
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 74: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Q_Spg'.: Q_Spg is a subcomponent of Q.Impl, not visible in component type Q contract -> remove the clause 'Data_Sink = Q_Spg.Data_Sink' because it references an implementation-local subcomponent port not expressible in component type contract
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 75: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: Property references like Dispatch_Protocol are not directly visible in AGREE without property set with-clauses and are only valid in component type if correctly scoped -> remove all property assumption clauses (Dispatch_Protocol, Period, deadline, Priority) because they reference AADL properties not directly accessible in AGREE without property set declarations, and their intent is already captured in AADL properties
